steps.title: Find the best-known achievement
steps.content: The notes explicitly state that Lena Park is best known for a 2011 YouTube video viewed over two million times. They also identify the performance as Three Beats for Beatbox Flute.

steps.title: Keep focus on Park
steps.content: A foregrounds competitions and beatboxing, B foregrounds education and awards, and D shifts attention to composer Marcus Rivera. The choice that states Park's best-known video performance and view count directly matches the goal. The answer is C.
